svg.title: TrueRender research progression: four pipeline iterations from v1 to v4
svg.desc: A vertical comparison showing four pipeline versions. v1 used COLMAP, 3DGS, and SuGaR but was slow. v2 swapped in VGGT and 2DGS for speed but TSDF mesh extraction broke on white backgrounds. v3 fixed masking with real RGBA alpha but TSDF still produced fragmented meshes. v4 pivoted to single-image generation with TripoSR, the path used by the final demo.
svg.text: Four iterations from multi-view reconstruction to single-image generation

g.text: Fix the masking pipeline, keep VGGT and 2DGS
Pivot: skip splats, use one clean image
